title: MikroTik RBMetalG-52SHPacn
description: RBMetalG-52SHPacn is a new, completely waterproof, robust and high-performance RouterBOARD designed for mounting directly on the antenna with N female connector. The new model unites 2 earlier products into one, and the radio part now works in both the 2.4 and 5GHz bands with a maximum transmission power of 1300mW . In addition to the commonly used 802.11a/b/g/n standards, the radio part also supports 802.11ac RBMetalG-52SHPacn has a built-in Gigabit Ethernet port and a L4 license for the ability to create a transmitter Device Power adapter 24V / 0.8A (2) Metal rings (2) Mounting loops Gigabit PoE injector Angled N connector Dual band 2.4/5GHz antenna (6dBi = 2.4GHz, 8dBi = 5GHz)
